home.metaTitle: Blue Moon Apartment | Mandre, Island of Pag, Croatia
home.metaDescription: Luxury 2-bedroom family apartment in Mandre, island of Pag. 92m², private hot tub terrace, sea views, 200m from the beach. Open June–September 2026.
home.aptBody: Perched on the 2nd floor of a quiet building, our semi-penthouse apartment combines contemporary design with breathtaking seaside views. Two bedrooms, two full bathrooms, a fully equipped modern kitchen, and a spacious terrace with a private hot tub — everything you need for an unforgettable family holiday.
home.aptBullet1: ✓ Two bedrooms with large, comfortable beds
home.aptBullet4: ✓ Spacious terrace with sea & sunset views
home.directIntro: Skip the booking platforms and connect with us directly for the best experience.
home.directCard1Body: No OTA commission fees — booking directly means better value with no hidden platform surcharges.
home.directCard2Body: Talk directly with Goran, your host. Get honest local tips, quick responses, and personal attention from day one.
home.directCard3Body: Customise your stay, discuss arrival times, and get tailored support that no booking algorithm can match.
home.priceNote: All prices are per night for the entire apartment (up to 6 guests). No per-person charges. Everything included. A minimum stay of 5 nights applies in all seasons.
home.mandreBody: A quiet, family-friendly haven on the island of Pag with crystal-clear water, Blue Flag beaches, and the warmth of authentic Croatian hospitality.
home.ctaBody: We respond to all inquiries within 24 hours.

apartment.metaTitle: The Apartment | Blue Moon Apartment, Mandre
apartment.metaDescription: 92m² semi-penthouse apartment in Mandre, island of Pag. 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, fully equipped kitchen, private hot tub terrace with sea & sunset views.
apartment.label: Blue Moon Apartment
apartment.pageSubtitle: 92 m² · 2 Bedrooms · Up to 6 Guests · 2nd Floor · Sea & Sunset Views
apartment.overviewBody1: This modern, recently renovated semi-penthouse apartment sits on the 2nd floor of a quiet residential building in Mandre, offering stunning seaside and sunset views from its spacious terrace. With 92 m² of thoughtfully designed interior and terrace space, it comfortably accommodates families and is ideal for up to 6 guests.
apartment.overviewBody2: The open-concept kitchen and living room area creates a warm, sociable atmosphere — perfect for relaxing in between beach days, or for sharing long Adriatic evenings with the people you love most.
apartment.terraceBody1: Step outside onto the spacious private terrace and you're greeted by a panoramic view of the shimmering Adriatic Sea and the breathtaking colours of a Croatian sunset. Whether it's morning coffee with the sea breeze or a candlelit dinner as the sun dips below the horizon — this is where memories are made.
apartment.terraceBody2: The private hot tub on the terrace is the apartment's crown jewel. Unwind after a day at the beach while watching the sky turn gold, with nothing but the gentle sounds of the sea.
apartment.terraceHotTubNote: ♨️ Private hot tub — ideal for relaxing evenings under the stars in complete privacy.
apartment.bedroomsBody: Both bedrooms are furnished with large, comfortable, king-size beds and quality linens to ensure a restful night's sleep. There's ample wardrobe space, and the rooms are kept cool by the air conditioning system.
apartment.bedroomsBody2: The layout works perfectly for two couples travelling together, or a family of four to six — each couple or set of parents gets their own private bedroom.
apartment.kitchenBody: The open kitchen is equipped with everything you need for cooking — whether it's a quick breakfast or a full family dinner with fresh Pag lamb and local produce from the nearby market.
apartment.kitchenBBQ: A barbecue is also available on request — perfect for those long summer evenings on the terrace.
apartment.bathroomsBody: Two full bathrooms mean no queuing in the morning. Each bathroom is modern and equipped with a shower and a toilet. The apartment also provides a hairdryer and iron for your convenience.
apartment.amenityBedroomItem2: 2 full bathrooms with showers and toilets
apartment.amenityLocationItem4: Town centre within easy walking distance
apartment.familyCalloutBody: Blue Moon Apartment is designed with families in mind. Whether you're a couple with two children or two families with small kids looking to share a holiday, the space, layout, and location all work perfectly for you. Up to 6 guests are accommodated comfortably.
apartment.ctaBody: Send us your dates and we'll confirm availability within 24 hours.

pricelist.metaDescription: Blue Moon Apartment pricing for 2026. €279/night peak season (July–August), €199/night early summer (June) and golden September. Book direct for the best price.
pricelist.label: Book Direct
pricelist.pageSubtitle: Season 2026 · Transparent Pricing, No Hidden Fees
pricelist.seasonSubtext: All prices are per night for the entire apartment (up to 6 guests). No per-person charges. Everything included.
pricelist.earlyNote: 🌿 Peaceful beaches, warm evenings — June is perfect for families who love space and calm.
pricelist.peakNote: ☀️ Long hot days, warm nights — this is the Croatian summer everyone dreams about.
pricelist.goldenNote: 🍃 Quieter beaches, cooler evenings — ideal for exploring the island at your own pace.
pricelist.minNights: A minimum stay of 5 nights applies in all seasons.

pricelist.checkoutBody: By 10:00 AM. Late check-out available on request, subject to availability.

booking.policyCheckoutBody: By 10:00 AM. Late check-out available on request, subject to availability.
booking.policyDepositBody: 30% bank transfer to confirm your booking. Bank details are sent once we approve your request. Remainder is due by bank transfer on arrival.
booking.policyCancelBody: Cancel 30+ days before arrival for a full deposit refund. Later cancellations: deposit is non-refundable.

booking.faq1A: You'll get an instant email confirming we received your request. Within 24 hours we'll reply to either confirm your booking or explain why those dates can't work. While we review, your dates are held — no one else can request them.
booking.faq2Q: How do I pay the deposit?
booking.faq2A: Once we confirm your booking by email, you'll receive bank transfer details for the 30% deposit. You have 3 days to send it. The remaining 70% is due by bank transfer on arrival.
booking.faq3Q: Can I modify my dates later?
booking.faq3A: Just reply to your reservation email. We'll do our best to find dates that work — subject to availability and our cancellation policy.
booking.faq4Q: I just want to ask a question first.
booking.faq4A: That's fine too. Use the contact form or WhatsApp instead — no need to reserve dates.

aboutMandre.metaTitle: About Mandre | Blue Moon Apartment, Island of Pag
aboutMandre.metaDescription: Discover Mandre — a small, quiet family-friendly town on the island of Pag, Croatia. Blue Flag beaches, children's playgrounds, local delicacies, and day trips.
aboutMandre.label: About Mandre
aboutMandre.pageSubtitle: A hidden gem on the island of Pag, Croatia
aboutMandre.townBody1: Mandre is a small, quiet tourist town nestled in a sheltered cove on the western shore of the island of Pag. It has exactly what a perfect Adriatic escape calls for: clean sea, friendly locals, a relaxed pace, and a promenade where families gather in the evenings under the Adriatic sky.
aboutMandre.townBody2: Unlike the busier destinations on the island, Mandre has managed to remain authentic and peaceful. There's no industry, no noise, and no crowds — just the gentle rhythm of island life. For families seeking a genuine Croatian holiday, this is it.
aboutMandre.beachesBody1: The entire shore of Mandre is lined with small beaches and coves, making it easy to find your perfect spot. The crown jewel is Mala Mandra beach — located right in the town centre, it has proudly held the prestigious Blue Flag since 2006, a mark of exceptionally clean water and well-maintained facilities.
aboutMandre.beachesBody2: Several larger pebble beaches are also within easy reach, offering more space for families to spread out. With a short boat ride, you can discover secluded coves and the breathtaking shores of the nearby uninhabited islands of Maun and Škrda.
aboutMandre.familyBody: Mandre is one of those rare places where children and parents are equally happy. The town is compact, safe, and wonderfully walkable — kids can run freely along the promenade while parents enjoy a coffee at a seafront café.
aboutMandre.familyBullet1: Two children's playgrounds — one in the town centre near Konzum, one near the larger pebble beach.
aboutMandre.familyBullet2: Mini football field — just a few minutes' walk from the apartment.
aboutMandre.familyBullet3: Bike & e-scooter friendly — the promenade and surrounding roads are ideal for cycling with children.
aboutMandre.familyBullet4: Summer events — themed evenings with music, local food and drinks are organised almost daily on the promenade throughout summer.
aboutMandre.convenienceItem1Body: A small market store is conveniently located directly across from the apartment — ideal for quick grocery shopping without getting in the car.
aboutMandre.convenienceItem2Body: A second market store, fish market, and pharmacy are all within a 5-minute walk — everything for a self-catering holiday.
aboutMandre.convenienceItem3Body: A larger market store is located at the town entrance, just a short drive uphill — perfect for a bigger weekly shop.
aboutMandre.convenienceItem4Body: Full supermarkets are available in the larger nearby towns. A great excuse to explore more of the island on the way!
aboutMandre.tasteBody: The island of Pag is world-famous for its extraordinary culinary heritage. Two products in particular are legendary, and you absolutely must try them during your stay:
aboutMandre.cheeseBody: This hard sheep's cheese is produced from the milk of Pag sheep who graze on the island's unique salt-swept pastures, grazed by the Bura wind. The result is an extraordinarily complex, aromatic cheese — one of Europe's finest. You'll find it in local shops, restaurants, and at island producers.
aboutMandre.lambBody: Slow-roasted over an open fire, Pag lamb is melt-in-your-mouth tender, with a unique flavour imparted by the same salty island herbs the animals graze on. Available at local restaurants, it's a must-order dish for any visitor to the island.
aboutMandre.picksSub: Personal recommendations from your host — updated each season.
aboutMandre.pick1Body: Head to Konoba Prtorić, just outside Mandre on the road to Šimuni — they serve some of the finest lamb on the island. Reservations are a must in peak season.
aboutMandre.pick2Body: The small pebbled beach directly below the Morska Vila souvenir shop is ideal for families — pick up cold drinks or ice cream at the shop above, and there's a children's playground nearby. A large beach is just a short walk along the shore if you need more space.
aboutMandre.pick3Body: Make the short drive to the Gligora dairy in Kolan for a factory tour and cheese tasting — the best way to find your favourite Paški sir and bring some home. Local private shops in Mandre also carry excellent selections.
aboutMandre.pick4Body: Walk along the promenade toward the marina at golden hour, then continue past the boats until you reach Meddy — a small spot serving the best homemade ice cream in Mandre.
aboutMandre.pick5Body: Find M/B Otac Luka at the marina and ask about their island day trips — a perfect full day out on the water to nearby Olib or Silba, both car-free islands with crystal-clear sea.
aboutMandre.tripsBody: Mandre's location makes it an ideal base for exploring some of Croatia's most spectacular natural and cultural highlights.
aboutMandre.trip1Body: Described as the most beautiful and unique trail in Croatia — a short drive from the apartment.
aboutMandre.trip2Body: Organised boat trips available from Luka Mandre — car-free islands of extraordinary charm.
aboutMandre.trip3Body: Two of Croatia's most spectacular parks within reach — Krka (~90 min) for waterfalls and swimming, Plitvice (~2 hrs) for breathtaking turquoise lakes. Guided excursions available for both.
aboutMandre.dist1Body: The historic capital of the island. Old town, salt pans, lace-makers, and great local restaurants.
aboutMandre.dist2Body: Croatia's most famous party beach near Novalja. A great evening option if the adults want a night out — Mandre remains peaceful.
aboutMandre.dist3Body: The mainland city of Zadar, reachable via the Pag Bridge. UNESCO old town, Sea Organ, Museum of Ancient Glass.
aboutMandre.dist4Body: Croatia's vibrant capital — a worth-it day trip if you're staying for a week or more.

contact.label: Contact

contact.reachUsBody: Whether you want to check availability, have questions about the apartment, or just want to know more about Mandre — we're here to help. Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.methodResponseValue: We respond within 24 hours, usually much faster.

contact.hostCareBody: Maintained to the standard we'd want for our own family.

contact.messagePlaceholder: What would you like to know?
contact.successBody: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.successBodyFull: Thank you — we'll get back to you within 24 hours. In the meantime, feel free to explore
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.
contact.errorEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.privacyNote: 🔒 Your details are used only to respond to your message and will not be shared with third parties.
contact.faq1Q: How do I make a reservation?
contact.faq1A: Use the booking page to check live availability and request a reservation. A 30% deposit secures your dates once we confirm.
contact.faq2Q: What payment methods do you accept?
contact.faq2A: Bank transfer only. We'll provide all payment details after confirming your dates.
contact.faq3A: Yes — a minimum of 5 nights applies in all seasons.
contact.faq4A: Unfortunately pets are not permitted in the apartment. We're sorry for the inconvenience.
contact.faq5Q: Is the garage suitable for my car?
contact.faq5A: The garage accommodates vehicles up to 2.60m wide and 2.40m high. A standard outdoor parking space is also available.
contact.faq6Q: We're arriving with two cars — is there space for both?
contact.faq6A: Yes — the property has both a private garage and a dedicated outdoor parking space, so two cars are no problem.
contact.faq7A: We'll do our best! Early check-in and late check-out are subject to availability. Just let us know.
contact.faq8Q: What kind of coffee machine do you have?
contact.faq8A: We have a Dolce Gusto machine. Additional capsules are available at the local Konzum market if you'd like to stock up.

directions.metaTitle: Directions | Blue Moon Apartment, Mandre, Island of Pag
directions.metaDescription: How to reach Blue Moon Apartment in Mandre, island of Pag, Croatia. Directions by car from Zadar and Zagreb, by ferry, and parking information on arrival.
directions.label: Directions
directions.pageSubtitle: Riječka ulica 30, Mandre, Island of Pag, Croatia
directions.zagreb1: From Zagreb, take the A1 motorway heading south towards Split.
directions.zagreb2: Exit at Otok Pag / Posedarje and follow signs towards Otok Pag.
directions.zagreb3: Cross the Pag Bridge onto the island.
directions.zagreb4: Follow the signs towards Novalja, then turn left to Kolan and on to Mandre.
directions.zagreb5: Enter Mandre. The apartment is at Riječka ulica 30, Mandre.
directions.byFerryNote: Shorter route if coming from Rijeka or beyond
directions.ferry1: Head to Prizna on the mainland coast — the ferry port across from Žigljen on the island of Pag.
directions.ferry2: Take the Jadrolinija car ferry from Prizna to Žigljen on the island of Pag. The crossing takes approximately 15 minutes. Ferries run frequently in summer.
directions.ferry3: From Žigljen (near Novalja), drive south through Novalja and Kolan towards Mandre. Approximately 20 minutes from the ferry port.
directions.airport1: Zadar Airport (ZAD) has many seasonal European connections including Ryanair and easyJet routes. Rent a car at the airport — a car is useful for island exploration.
directions.airport2: From the airport, head towards Zemunik Donji, then continue to Suhovare.
directions.airport3: Follow the road towards the Pag Bridge (Paški Most) and cross onto the island.
directions.airport4: Continue north along the island towards Novalja, then turn left to Kolan and on to Mandre.
directions.findingAddress: Riječka ulica 30, Mandre, Island of Pag, Croatia
directions.finding1: Enter Mandre. As you drive into the town you'll pass the Lorenco store on your left.
directions.finding3: Take the third right, then the second right onto Riječka ulica.
directions.finding4: The apartment is at Riječka ulica 30. Outdoor parking and a private garage are available on site.
directions.parkingBody: Blue Moon Apartment includes private parking for your complete peace of mind — no searching for spots or paying daily fees.
directions.parkingOption1Body: A dedicated private parking space is available directly next to the building — suitable for all standard vehicles.
directions.parkingOption2Body: A private garage is available for one vehicle. Please note the size restrictions:
directions.garageNote: Standard SUVs and family cars fit comfortably. Taller vans or minibuses may not fit — please check your vehicle dimensions in advance.
directions.mapSubtext: We're located on the island of Pag, on Croatia's northern Dalmatian coast — about 75 km south of Zadar.
